title: Rust lichen-oscore: WINDOW_SIZE constant referenced but not defined in visible scope
description: In rust/lichen-oscore/src/lib.rs check_replay() method at line 770, the code references WINDOW_SIZE constant. However, looking at the diff, the constant appears to have been removed or refactored. Need to verify that WINDOW_SIZE is defined somewhere in scope. If it was previously a local const in the function and moved to module level, ensure the value (32) is preserved.
close_reason: False positive: WINDOW_SIZE is defined as a pub const at line 84 of lib.rs. The diff showed it being used but not the definition because the definition was on a line that wasn't changed.
